description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story barn with a corrugated metal exterior painted in a weathered red color. The front facade features a large central door on the ground level, flanked by two smaller windows, and two additional windows symmetrically placed above. The roof is a simple, single-pitch shed style with visible corrugation along the top edge. The siding is vertically oriented, giving the structure a classic utilitarian appearance. The barn appears partially open at the back and sides, suggesting it may be a facade or partially ruined structure.
description: A red, two-story barn with vertical corrugated metal siding, a central door, and symmetrically arranged windows, topped by a single-pitch shed roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical corrugated siding and the depth of the barn, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main door, two lower windows, and two upper windows, all symmetrically arranged.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the vertical siding and the barn's depth.
description_view_3: Another front view, nearly identical to view 1, highlighting the central door and window arrangement.
attribute_door_style: single large hinged door centered on the front facade
attribute_window_arrangement: four windows, two on each level, symmetrically placed on either side of the central door
